video_job.actor_prompt: Japanese fantasy RPG guild forge, warm wood interior. Yuna Ironleaf, a feminine ranger with a green half-cape and leaf brooch, steadies a dented metal shield on a workbench. Yuna Brightford, a masculine quartermaster in a neat vest and guild sash, uses a small, safe repair tool to smooth a dent. Warm forge light, cooperative hands, cinematic medium shot, no text, no watermark.
video_job.target_continuation_prompt: Same continuous forge shot, consistent lighting and characters. Yuna Ironleaf continues to hold the shield steady as Yuna Brightford carefully taps the final repair mark on the metal surface with his tool. Friendly teamwork, clear tool motion, warm ambient lighting, no text, no watermark.
video_job.safety_notes: The interaction is strictly professional and cooperative, focusing on a guild task. No sexual, violent, or inappropriate content is depicted.

timeline_story.selection_reason: The forge is overwhelmed with repairs from the recent goblin raid, and Yuna Ironleaf assists the quartermaster Yuna Brightford to clear the backlog.

relationship_adjustments.reason: Collaborative repair work builds mutual professional respect.
Valued assistance during a high-pressure supply shortage.
